A

addAssociatedParts(Part) - Method in class myatt.Model.Product
Adds a part to the associated part list for the product.
addPart(Part) - Static method in class myatt.Model.Inventory
Adds a new part to the inventory.
AddPartController - Class in myatt.Controller
This class controls the user interface for the Add Part form.

addPartsButton(ActionEvent) - Method in class myatt.Controller.MainScreenController
This method handles the add part button event.
addProduct(Product) - Static method in class myatt.Model.Inventory
Adds a new product to the inventory.
AddProductController - Class in myatt.Controller
The AddProductController class controls the Add Product form.

addProductsButton(ActionEvent) - Method in class myatt.Controller.MainScreenController
This method handles the add product button for the product table.
